prompt: Create a single high-fidelity mobile app UI design mockup, portrait 9:16, iOS Human Interface Guidelines inspired, for a Chinese parent-facing student growth points app. This is a redesigned UI based on a reference screenshot content structure, not a copy. Keep only essential interface content: top profile header with a smiling elementary school GIRL avatar, name 林小满, class 2024级2班, two icon buttons 档案 and a bell notification with badge 2; main card with 本月净得分, large 45 分, status pill 稳步成长, compact metrics 表扬 13次 and 待改进 1次, and a subtle entry 全部记录; second card with 预计可得, large 90.88, two compact reward blocks 成长奖励 70.5 and 得分奖励 20.38; bottom tab bar with exactly three tabs 成长 selected, 报告, 银行. Completely new visual design: warm futuristic education technology, subtle AI-inspired neural network arcs, data glow particles, frosted glass white cards, misty diffused gradients in pale cyan, mint, soft lavender and white. Use small refined blue-green, violet and peach gradient icon containers. Clean SF Pro-like Chinese typography, crisp and readable, iOS safe area, consistent rounded corners, soft shadows, restrained density. Do not add any explanatory notes, footer status text, update time, marketing copy, technical labels, wireframe annotations, English words, or large AI letters. Do not use a dark cyberpunk style, game style, clutter, oversized decorative hero, or extra page sections. The result must look like a polished real production iPhone app screenshot.
